commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run src/commands/next-fitness-report.test.ts src/commands/next-agent-parity.test.ts src/commands/next-decision-meta.test.ts src/commands/next.test.ts src/lib/decision/harness-decision.test.ts src/lib/synaipse/state.test.ts --reporter=dot
commands.evidence: Vitest reported 6 passing files and 132 passing tests.

Direct constructor and validator probe rejected known malformed fields, proved copied mutable arrays did not alias, and reproduced an undeclared permissionPlan.mutatesExternal field accepted with valid true and no errors.
Returned f2de738ff0cef0c036b2f48ab3ba06f3a5157208, matching the immutable target.

findings.summary: validateHarnessDecision accepts an undeclared recommendationEffects.permissionPlan.mutatesExternal field, so a malformed v1 permission plan is marked valid.
findings.remediation: Reject unknown keys at the recommendationEffects, authority, and permissionPlan levels while retaining additive outer meta compatibility; add a known-bad regression fixture.

claims_boundary: Rejected only because the fresh local adversarial review found one P2 malformed-envelope contract gap. The passing local commands prove their listed source, type, and diff lanes only; they do not prove a repair, fresh QA acceptance, hosted CI, external review, acceptance, PR state, merge, release, or readiness.
